description: Final Fantasy X is a game

v0.2.1.description:
### FFX Apworld v0.2.1
- Dark Ixion now logically requires Yuna to avoid crashing (@andrewki44)
- Celestial Upgrade locations now logically post-Spherimorph, instead of 2nd visit Macalania (@andrewki44)
- Geminis are now logically placed in Omega Ruins as well as Inside Sin. They are only available post-Omega Weapon (@andrewki44)
- Saturn Sigil moved to 2nd visit Macalania (@andrewki44)
- Ahriman logically move from post-Omnis to pre-Omnis Inside Sin (@andrewki44)
- Macalania Crevasse chest is now logically available post-Crawler ([supported by CSR update](https://github.com/FFX-AP/FFXCSRRando/releases/tag/v1.7.2-r1.3.3)) (@andrewki44)
- Dark Yojimbo now logically requires Yuna + 2 Aeons in order to pass Zanmato (@andrewki44)
- Removed "/" from multiple location names for better Poptracker & UT compatibility (@andrewki44)
- Sanitize required party members slot data based on goal requirement (@andrewki44)
- Fixed several typos in location names (@omnises)
- Updated location names to use 4 letter prefixes instead of full length region names (@relvanth)

[Compatible FFX-Client v0.4.1](https://github.com/FFX-AP/Archipelago-FFX-Client/releases/tag/v0.4.1)
v0.2.1.title: v0.2.1

v0.3.0.description:
## FFX Apworld v0.3.0

### Enhancements
- Customisations as AP Items (@Rurusachi)
  - Weapons & Armor
  - Aeon Abilities
- Pre-Remiem Belgemine Locations (@Rurusachi)
  - Defeat Belgemine in Miihen, Moonflow & Calm Lands + Aeon's / Summoner's Souls
- Jecht's Sphere Locations (@Andrewki44)
- Allow Capturing with other damage types (@Rurusachi)
- Skip Contest of Aeons option (@Rurusachi)
- Replace .json seeds with .apffx patch files (@Andrewki44)
  - Now downloadable from AP room directly
- Update AP Multiplier description in yaml (@Omnises)
- Randomize Mark of Conquest location (@Andrewki44)

### Bugs
- Moved Gorge Bottom room to CotSF from Calm Lands (@Andrewki44)
  - Resolves a bug where Dark Yojimbo required Calm Lands access to spawn
v0.3.0.title: v0.3.0

v0.6.0.description:
## FFX Apworld v0.6.0

### Feature
- Add all Blitz Players as Locations (@EvelynTSMG & @Andrewki44)
- Granular Minigame Options (@EvelynTSMG)
- Remiem Chocobo Race Chests now randomized (@Andrewki44)
- Mars Sigil location now randomized (@Andrewki44)

### Enhancement
- Progressive Al Bhed Primers (@Andrewki44)
- Progressive Cloudy/Celestial Mirror (@Andrewki44)
- Options Groups (@EvelynTSMG)
- Allow AP Multipliers to be set to 0 - NSG (@Andrewki44)
- S.S. Liki logic now allows for the chest & primer location to be available before Sin Fin / Echuilles in logically accessible (@Andrewki44)

### Documentation
- Create proper ReadMe & Setup documentation on the apworld (@Omnises)

### Bug Fixes
- Miihen Blitzball kid now marked as missable (@Rurusachi)
- Varuna capture logic removed from Inside Sin (@Andrewki44)
  - They are only accessible inside the Nucleus, which is skipped by CSR
- Magus Sisters no longer considered for ranged logic - S.S. Liki (@Andrewki44)
v0.6.0.title: v0.6.0

v0.6.1.description:
## FFX Apworld v0.6.1

### Bug Fixes
- Contracted Blitz Recruits are now excluded correctly based on yaml options (@Andrewki44)
v0.6.1.title: v0.6.1
